verif_result.fix_hint: Simulation completed but values disagreed. max_error=1 across 150528 samples. See first_mismatch_* and expected/got for raw evidence.
verif_result.verilator_stderr: Simulation completed but values disagreed. max_error=1 across 150528 samples. See first_mismatch_* and expected/got for raw evidence.
verif_result.classifier_reason: Simulation completed successfully with all 1568 outputs received. Two issues are fixable by repair: (1) timing_actual_cycles=100 vs expected=99 — one extra pipeline register or off-by-one latency counter; (2) max_error=1 across 279/150528 samples (0.18%) with balanced positive/negative errors (130 vs 149) — consistent with an INT8 requantization rounding mode mismatch (round-half-up vs truncate) in the scale-factor arithmetic, not a structural or resource problem. No bus-width, resource-utilization, or toolchain errors present.
